allow:
Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
\\$Shortcut = \\$WshShell.CreateShortcut\('\\$env:USERPROFILE\\Desktop\\GMDS Space Hardware Assistant.lnk'\)
\\$Shortcut.TargetPath = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant\\launch.bat'
\\$Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant'
\\$Shortcut.Description = 'Launch GMDS Space Hardware Assistant'
\\$Shortcut.WindowStyle = 1
\\$Shortcut.Save\(\)
Write-Host 'Shortcut created successfully'
")

Bash(powershell -Command "$desktop = [System.Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\); $WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $Shortcut = $WshShell.CreateShortcut\(\\"$desktop\\\\GMDS Space Hardware Assistant.lnk\\"\); $Shortcut.TargetPath = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant\\launch.bat'; $Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant'; $Shortcut.Description = 'Launch GMDS Space Hardware Assistant'; $Shortcut.WindowStyle = 1; $Shortcut.Save\(\); Write-Host \\"Shortcut created at: $desktop\\"")

Bash(powershell -File - << 'EOF'
$desktop = [System.Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\)
$WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
$lnkPath = Join-Path $desktop "GMDS Space Hardware Assistant.lnk"
$Shortcut = $WshShell.CreateShortcut\($lnkPath\)
$Shortcut.TargetPath = "C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant\\launch.bat"
$Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = "C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant"
$Shortcut.Description = "Launch GMDS Space Hardware Assistant"
$Shortcut.WindowStyle = 1
$Shortcut.Save\(\)
Write-Host "Shortcut created at: $lnkPath"
EOF)

Bash(powershell -Command "
\\$desktop = [System.Environment]::GetFolderPath\('Desktop'\)
\\$lnkPath = Join-Path \\$desktop 'GMDS Space Hardware Assistant.lnk'
\\$WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
\\$Shortcut = \\$WshShell.CreateShortcut\(\\$lnkPath\)
\\$Shortcut.TargetPath = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant\\launch.bat'
\\$Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant'
\\$Shortcut.Description = 'Launch GMDS Space Hardware Assistant'
\\$Shortcut.IconLocation = 'C:\\AI-Tools\\GMDS-Space-Hardware-Assistant\\icon.ico,0'
\\$Shortcut.WindowStyle = 1
\\$Shortcut.Save\(\)
Write-Host 'Shortcut updated with icon'
")
